title: Undead Adventures+
description: A vanilla+ take on the Minecraft zombie apocalypse genre
body:
Want to host a Minecraft server? https://flow.bloom.host/

![Bloom Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8348b80f4dd78886a0a55ec7fde97675f11e962e.png)

Bored of vanilla Minecraft? Looking for a challenge? This modpack contains about 100 mods that will transform the game into a zombie apocalypse.

Undead Adventures+ brings a fresh take on the Minecraft zombie genre being a vanilla+/fabric modpack, when typically most modpacks in this space are made for Forge. See below some of the standout features of this modpack.

- 🧟 Enhanced difficulty through elite monsters and abilities
- 🌄 Vanilla+ terrain via Geophilic
- 🔫 Dozens of weapons to choose from via Point Blank
- 👁️ Zombies can see farther and will not burn in daylight
- 🎧 Audio ambience, cave reverb, and several UI mods to increase immersion
- ✨ And much more

FAQ:

How do I improve performance when playing this modpack?

Reducing shader quality settings or outright disabling shaders can help immensely, or disabling Distant Horizons rendering.

Is there a server-sided only version of this modpack that I can use for my server?

No, this modpack is made for singleplayer only.
